name: Shrimp Fra Diavolo Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 can (28 oz.) plum tomatoes in puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the minced garlic, salt, and crushed red pepper. Cook for 30 seconds.
2. Stir in the plum tomatoes in puree. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer. Cook for 5 minutes.
4. Add the cleaned medium shrimp and cook until they turn opaque throughout, about 2 more minutes.
5. Serve hot with pasta over the top of the sauce.
